assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-6 contain '## Repository Registry' with table headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and separator '|---|---|---|---|' but no data rows follow.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 8-12 contain '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', and '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 14-20 contain '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and '### Limitations' stating 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 7-15: '### Serena Discovery' states 'No Serena MCP tools found. Searched for tools matching `mcp__serena__*` or similar Serena patterns in the tool listing.' and lists the MCP tools that were present, concluding 'None of these are Serena tools.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 20-31: '### Atlassian / Jira Discovery' states 'No Atlassian MCP tools found. Searched for tools matching `mcp__atlassian__*`, `mcp__jira__*`, or similar patterns. None were present.' Then documents 'User response: Chose manual entry and provided the following fields: Project key: MYPROJ, Cloud ID: abc123, Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 17-18: '**User prompt:** Asked whether to continue without code intelligence. **User response:** Chose to continue without code intelligence.'

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 33-36 document: '### Security Configuration — **User prompt:** Asked whether to enable security triage. **User response:** Declined. Security configuration was not added.' claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section — the file ends after the Limitations subsection at line 21.
